column1: # HiChIP cohort: GSE101498 / PRJNA394682 (Mumbach et al., Nat Genet 2017,
# "Enhancer connectome in primary human cells reveals target genes of
# Primary human CD4+ T-cell subsets, H3K27ac HiChIP, three biological replicates
# per subset, plus CTCF HiChIP in naive cells as an architectural-anchor arm.
# `srr` holds one or more run accessions. Where a biological replicate was
# sequenced as several technical replicates the runs are comma-separated, and
# rules/00_fetch_sra.smk concatenates them into one library. Technical replicates
# are the same library sequenced twice: merging them is correct, and carrying them
# as separate rows would inflate n and understate the variance the differential
